DIMCURE.NAME: DIM CURE
DIMCURE.DESCRIPTION:
Restore {AMOUNT} health to {NUMBER} different player monster(s).
COST: {COST} X {CREST}

DIMCUREALL.NAME: DIM CURE ALL
DIMCUREALL.DESCRIPTION: Restore {AMOUNT} health to all player monster(s). This ability cannot be skipped.

DIMKILLWEAKEST.NAME: DIM KILL WEAKEST
DIMKILLWEAKEST.DESCRIPTION: Excluding this monster, destroy the monster with the lowest attack (after ability effect computation).

DIMKILLTUNNEL.NAME: DIM KILL TUNNEL
DIMKILLTUNNEL.DESCRIPTION:
Destroy one monster with the active ability TUNNEL.
COST: {COST} X {CREST}

DIMKILLTUNNELALL.NAME: DIM KILL TUNNEL ALL
DIMKILLTUNNELALL.DESCRIPTION:
Destroy all monsters with the active ability TUNNEL.
COST: {COST} X {CREST}

DIMADDCREST.NAME: DIM ADD CREST
DIMADDCREST.DESCRIPTION: Add {AMOUNT} {CREST}(s) to player crestpool. This ability cannot be skipped.

DIMTRADECREST.NAME: DIM TRADE CREST
DIMTRADECREST.DESCRIPTION: Pay {COST} crest(s) of any type. Add {AMOUNT} crest(s) of any type to player crestpool.

EXODIA.NAME: EXODIA
EXODIA.DESCRIPTION: Win the game if player controls 'R Leg of Forbidden', 'L Leg of Forbidden', 'L Arm of Forbidden' and 'R Arm of Forbidden'. This ability cannot be skipped.

DIMBUFFDEADTYPE.NAME: DIM BUFF DEAD TYPE
DIMBUFFDEADTYPE.DESCRIPTION: For each dead monster of type {TYPE} of both players, add the original attack and defense of the dead monsters to this monster. This ability cannot be skipped.

STOPFLY.NAME: STOP FLY
STOPFLY.DESCRIPTION: Negate the FLY ability of all monsters.

STOPTUNNEL.NAME: STOP TUNNEL
STOPTUNNEL.DESCRIPTION: Negate the TUNNEL ability of all monsters.

TURNSLOWTYPE.NAME: TURN SLOW TYPE
TURNSLOWTYPE.DESCRIPTION: {TYPE} monsters can only move once every two turns, stating forbidding movement in each player next turn and re-enabling it in the turn after the next. NOTE: Two or more instances of this ability can be stacked to cancel movement completely.

PROTECTTYPE.NAME: PROTECT TYPE
PROTECTTYPE.DESCRIPTION: Reduce attack and ability damage to all {TYPE} monsters to 0.

MOVELIMIT.NAME: MOVE LIMIT
MOVELIMIT.DESCRIPTION: This monster can move a maximum of {MAX} tile(s) per turn.

RAISESPEED.NAME: RAISE SPEED
RAISESPEED.DESCRIPTION: This monster can move up to {AMOUNT} tiles per MOVEMENT crest.

MULTIATTACK.NAME: MULTI ATTACK
MULTIATTACK.DESCRIPTION: This monster can attack a maximum of {MAX} time(s) per turn.

RAISEATTACK.NAME: RAISE ATTACK
RAISEATTACK.DESCRIPTION:
Raise attack power by 10x the number of paid ATTACK crests (additionals to the crest for attacking), up to a maximum of {MAX}.
COST: (1..{MAX} X ATTACK)

REDUCEDAMAGE.NAME: REDUCE DAMAGE
REDUCEDAMAGE.DESCRIPTION:
Reduce damage dealt during attack by{AMOUNT}.
COST: {COST} X {CREST}

REDUCEDAMAGEINF.NAME: REDUCE DAMAGE INF
REDUCEDAMAGEINF.DESCRIPTION:
Choose a number of DEFENSE crests to pay. Reduce damage dealt during attack by 10x the number of paid crests.
COST: (1..99) X DEFENSE

SHIFTDAMAGE.NAME: SHIFT DAMAGE
SHIFTDAMAGE.DESCRIPTION:
Select a player monster other than this monster. Shift all the damage dealt during attack to the selected monster.
COST: {COST} X {CREST}

PROTECTSELF.NAME: PROTECT SELF
PROTECTSELF.DESCRIPTION:
Reduce damage dealt during attack to 0.
COST: {COST} X {CREST}

ADDFOEDEFENSE.NAME: ADD FOE DEFENSE
ADDFOEDEFENSE.DESCRIPTION:
Before attack calculations, permanently add attacking monster defense to this monster defense.
COST: {COST} X {CREST}

KILLBLOCK.NAME: KILL BLOCK
KILLBLOCK.DESCRIPTION:
Replace a block tile with an empty tile.
COST: {COST} X {CREST}

BUFFDAMAGE.NAME: BUFF DAMAGE
BUFFDAMAGE.DESCRIPTION:
Raise this monster {ATTR} by the total damage dealt to this monster (monster max. health minus current health).
COST: {COST} X {CREST}

BUFFSELF.NAME: BUFF SELF
BUFFSELF.DESCRIPTION:
Raise this monster {ATTR} by the {AMOUNT}.
COST: {COST} X {CREST}

TRADEHEALTH.NAME: TRADE HEALTH
TRADEHEALTH.DESCRIPTION:
Deal {AMOUNT} damage to this monster and an opponent monster.
COST: {COST} X {CREST}

STEALMONSTER.NAME: STEAL MONSTER
STEALMONSTER.DESCRIPTION:
Destroy this monster. Gain control of one opponent monster for the rest of the duel.
COST: {COST} X {CREST}

MINDCONTROL.NAME: MIND CONTROL
MINDCONTROL.DESCRIPTION:
Gain control of one opponent monster until the end of the turn.
COST: {COST} X {CREST}

ROLLLEVELKILL.NAME: ROLL LEVEL KILL
ROLLLEVELKILL.DESCRIPTION:
Choose a level (1 to 4). The ability cost is increased by the selected level x {CREST} crest. Choose a direction (left, right, up, down). Move the monster in the chosen direction. If it hits a flying monster, continue movement without affecting the hit monster. If it hits a non-flying monster/item whose level is lower or equal to the selected level, destroy that monster/item and continue movement (items abilities are not activated). If it hits a non-flying monster/item whose level is higher that the selected level, or a monster lord, or an empty tile, stop movement and locate the monster in the last visited unoccupied path tile.
COST: {COST}+[1..4] X {CREST}

RANGELEVELKILL.NAME: RANGE LEVEL KILL
RANGELEVELKILL.DESCRIPTION:
Choose an opponent monster/item at range {RANGE}. The ability cost is increased by the level of the selected monster/item x {CREST} crest. Destroy the selected monster/item.
COST: {COST}+[1..4] X {CREST}

RANGEKILLALL.NAME: RANGE KILL ALL
RANGEKILLALL.DESCRIPTION:
Except for this monster, destroy all monster and items at range {RANGE}.
COST: {COST} X {CREST}

DISTANCEATTACK.NAME: DISTANCE ATTACK
DISTANCEATTACK.DESCRIPTION:
Until the end of the turn, the maximum attack distance for this monster becomes {MAX}, and the attack crest cost becomes 0. NOTE: Distance attacks can go through monsters, items and monster lords, but not through empty tiles and blocks.
COST: {COST} X {CREST}

NEGATEATKABI.NAME: NEGATE ATTACK ABILITY
NEGATEATKABI.DESCRIPTION:
Select a monster. The selected monster cannot longer attack or activate its abilities, and its continuous abilities are negated.
COST: {COST} X {CREST}

TIMEMACHINE.NAME: TIME MACHINE
TIMEMACHINE.DESCRIPTION: Move monster to its starting location of its last movement.

MONSTERREBORN.NAME: MONSTER REBORN
MONSTERREBORN.DESCRIPTION: Select a monster dice from player graveyard. Remove that dice from graveyard and add it to player dicepool.

BLACKHOLE.NAME: BLACK HOLE
BLACKHOLE.DESCRIPTION: Destroy all monsters and tems in dungeon.

GLUMINIZER.NAME: GLUMINIZER
GLUMINIZER.DESCRIPTION: Double the movement cost of all monsters. Only one GLUMINIZER ability can be activated per duel.

WARPVORTEX.NAME: WARP VORTEX
WARPVORTEX.DESCRIPTION: Summon a warp vortex in the dimensioned location.
